title: Cobblemon Server Template
description: A Cobblemon 1.7 (Fabric) Server Template, which comes with Mega Pokemon, Legendary Spawning, and server-optimisations pre-configured!
body:
![Cobblemon Server List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b1507634cbef965746a4d69cea11383d8e0e57.png)

# Cobblemon Server Template

This is the best starter template for private SMPs with your friends. We've bundled mods that add **Mega Pokemon** & **Legendary Spawning**, alongside a bunch of QoL and server-side optimisation mods - so you can get your server up and running in less than 5 minutes.

This template was created by [Roanoke Development](https://roanoke.dev/), the team behind premium Cobblemon server-side mods & [Cobblemon Tools](https://cobblemon.tools/). We've worked with all of the big Cobblemon Networks, and put everything you need in this simple pack.

Your friends can install the same modpack, as it also comes with client-side mods, so they can start playing instantly!

# Read the full guide on Cobblemon Tools

We created a full guide to setting up a Cobblemon Server using this template - [read it on Cobblemon Tools](https://cobblemon.tools/guides/how-to-host-cobblemon-server)

This template was designed to be used with [Sparked Host](https://sparked.host/roanoke) who have a great range of powerful server plans at reasonable prices.
